title: tanacetum polycephalum subsp. duderanum
intro: Tanacetum polycephalum subsp. duderanum, commonly known as Duder's tansy or Duder's tansy thistle, is a plant species within the genus Tanacetum, belonging to the family Asteraceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of this plant are attributed to its ability to relieve digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate pain, making it a potential remedy for various health conditions. Herbal preparations of Tanacetum polycephalum subsp. duderanum may be used in teas, infusions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its efficacy and potential interactions.
